title: Job Opening Category Manager at Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Raipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates:
Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates!
